title: cistus × purpureus f. holorhodos
intro: Cistus × purpureus f. holorhodos, also known as the Purple Cistus or Rock Rose, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Cistus genus, characterized by its purple flowers and fragrant leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties, which can help in treating wounds, skin issues, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Cistus × purpureus f. holorhodos include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
